title: Act 25 2025 - Penal Code (Amendment) Act 2025
text:
[23rd December 2025] Penal Code (Amendment) Act 404
REPUBLIC OF SEYCHELLES SUPPLEMENT TO OFFICIAL GAZETTE ACT
PENAL CODE (AMENDMENT) ACT, 2025
(Act 25 of 2025)
ARRANGEMENT OF SECTIONS
SECTIONS
1. Short title
2. Amendment of section 5

[23rd December 2025] Penal Code (Amendment) Act 405
REPUBLIC OF SEYCHELLES SUPPLEMENT TO OFFICIAL GAZETTE ACT
PENAL CODE (AMENDMENT) ACT, 2025
(Act 25 of 2025)
I assent
22nd December, 2025
AN ACT TO AMEND THE PENAL CODE (CAP. 158).
ENACTED BY THE PRESIDENT AND THE NATIONAL ASSEMBLY.
Short title
1. This Act may be cited as the Penal Code (Amendment) Act, 2025.

[23rd December 2025] Penal Code (Amendment) Act 406
REPUBLIC OF SEYCHELLES SUPPLEMENT TO OFFICIAL GAZETTE ACT
Amendment of section 5
2. Section 5 of the Penal Code (Cap. 158), is amended in the definition of
“protected characteristics” —
(a) by repealing paragraph (g); and
(b) by renumbering paragraph (h) as paragraph (g).
I certify that this is a correct copy of the Bill which was passed by the National Assembly on
18th December, 2025.
Mrs. Tania Isaac
Clerk to the National Assembly
